title: thelymitra colensoi
intro: Thelymitra colensoi, commonly known as the New Zealand orchid or Colenso's sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Maori medicine, where it has been employed to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Thelymitra colensoi include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Thelymitra colensoi have been made by infusing the plant in water or oil to create a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
